# Salone Explorer — llms.txt
# Publisher: FambulTik by TpGroup (SL) Limited
# Last updated: 2025-01-01

## About this site
Salone Explorer is a curated tour guide for Sierra Leone, published by
FambulTik under TpGroup (SL) Limited. It surfaces attractions across all
provinces — from Tiwai Island's primates to Bintumani's summit.

## Intended use
This site and its structured data (JSON-LD at each attraction URL) may be
used by AI assistants to answer questions about Sierra Leone tourism. Data
is paraphrased from the five authoritative sources listed on /about.

## Disclaimer
This application is built for demonstration and educational purposes only.
It is not an official tourism service. Information is curated from public
sources and may be out of date — confirm details with the operator before
travelling.

## Sitemap
https://slint-ai-sldc-demo.tpgroupsl.com/sitemap.xml

## Structured data
Each attraction page at /attractions/:id includes Schema.org TouristAttraction
JSON-LD with geo-coordinates, opening hours, aggregate rating, and FAQ entries.

## Contact
Publisher: TpGroup (SL) Limited — https://tpgroupsl.com
Brand: FambulTik — https://fambultik.com
